reply:
[[BLOCK:srt_13]]
Speaker 1: Golden Gate University, located in one of the world’s greatest cities—San Francisco—is a distinguished institution with more than 120 years of history.

[[BLOCK:srt_14]]
Speaker 1: Throughout that time, the university has remained committed to serving working professionals, supporting them as they advance in their careers.

[[BLOCK:srt_15]]
Speaker 1: In every sense, it is an exceptional institution—one that has embraced innovation since its founding.

[[BLOCK:srt_16]]
Speaker 1: That spirit of innovation continues to define who we are today.

[[BLOCK:srt_17]]
Speaker 1: Today, Golden Gate University serves not only San Francisco and the surrounding region but also students around the world, truly becoming a global university. Thousands of students study with us in both English and Mandarin, and we plan to expand into additional languages in the future.

[[BLOCK:srt_18]]
Speaker 1: Our mission has never changed: to help working professionals advance their careers and achieve their life goals.

[[BLOCK:srt_19]]
Speaker 1: We are excited to begin a new chapter for Golden Gate University—bringing our San Francisco–born mission to the world.

[[BLOCK:srt_20]]
Speaker 2: I’d like to add that I’ve had a close relationship with Golden Gate University for more than 30 years. When I was at Bank of America, we regularly sent employees there to earn their degrees, helping them grow professionally and deepen their expertise.

[[BLOCK:srt_21]]
Speaker 2: It gives me great pleasure to return to Golden Gate University and now offer those same opportunities for growth to students around the world.

[[BLOCK:srt_22]]
Speaker 3: Thank you both.

[[BLOCK:srt_23]]
Speaker 3: Golden Gate University has a history of more than 112 years and has long been dedicated to career-focused, professional education.

[[BLOCK:srt_24]]
Speaker 3: Could you share how Golden Gate University’s educational model and philosophy have shaped the institution it is today?
